description: A paralegal is assigned a batch of 1,000 documents in an e-discovery platform and must code them for relevance to the case.

nodes.task_description: Open the assigned batch of documents in the e-discovery tool.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully accesses the document batch.

nodes.task_description: For each document, read its content and determine if it is responsive to the litigation's discovery requests.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent makes a relevance determination for each document.

nodes.task_description: Apply the appropriate tag ('Responsive' or 'Not Responsive') to each document in the batch.

expected_outcome.expected: All documents in the batch are correctly coded.
